etymology.description: 𰀡: phonetic 臤 + semantic 貝 -> valuable or worthy
etymology.interpretation: 𰀡 is an ancient form of 賢(賢) (xián, "worthy"). It combines the phonetic element 臤 with the semantic 貝(貝) (bèi, "money"), suggesting worthiness or value similar to the importance attached to money. This understanding emphasizes the character's association with merit or excellence.
